steps.instruction: Look at the main navigation menu and click on the 'Haberler' or 'Duyurular' link.
Verify that the news list page has successfully loaded by checking if the page header contains 'Haber'.
Find the very first news card or title link on the list and click on it.
Verify that the individual news detail page is opened by checking for a visible heading or back button.
Find the main title text of this current news article and extract it.
Find the date or timestamp on this news page and extract the text.
Scroll down to the middle of the page to read through the news content.
Verify that the text content of the news or description paragraphs are visible on the screen.
Scroll completely to the bottom of the page to reach the footer.
